summary:
GEOPOLITICAL CONFLICTS AND LEADERS: Brandon discusses a spiritual and geopolitical conflict involving an Antichrist system attempting to provoke a war to distract and delay progress during Donald Trump's upcoming presidency. Brandon states that the enemy intends to turn Trump into a wartime president. To counter this, Brandon directs focus toward various global leaders and entities, including Vladimir Putin, Joe Biden, Volodymyr Zelensky, Emmanuel Macron, and NATO. The statements specifically aim to halt the use of long-range, hypersonic, nuclear, and advanced conventional missiles in Europe. Brandon also speaks against the escalation of war that could potentially involve North Korea, Japan, China, Iran, Iraq, Syria, and Turkey, declaring a period of extended grace and peace for 2025 and 2026.

PUBLIC FIGURES AND SPIRITUAL REVIVAL: Brandon focuses on specific public figures, discussing the radical spiritual salvation of Elon Musk. Brandon envisions Musk using Starlink for divine purposes, avoiding negative influences, and becoming a prominent voice for the Kingdom of God, comparing his potential influence to that of Billy Graham. Additionally, Brandon envisions Donald Trump experiencing a profound spiritual rebirth, resulting in Trump boldly proclaiming his faith. Brandon foresees a widespread spiritual revival occurring on the floors of the Senate and the House of Representatives, as well as on a global scale.

PLAGUES, PROTECTION, AND NATIONAL EVENTS: Brandon recalls seeing visions of a forthcoming plague and an economic crash but asserts that these disasters are being mitigated. Brandon declares divine protection over households, citing biblical promises that families will be shielded from sickness, pestilence, and physical harm. Furthermore, Brandon focuses on upcoming national events, calling for hidden demonic plots to be exposed and brought to justice during the Thanksgiving Day parade, and stating that Donald Trump will be safe and protected during Inauguration Day.

HEALTH, HEALING, AND PHYSICAL WELLBEING: Brandon leads declarations of physical healing, rejecting diseases such as cancer and diabetes. A significant portion of the focus is on women's health and fertility. Brandon speaks about the healing of reproductive organs, hormonal balance, and menstrual cycles. Brandon decrees that women will experience symptom-free pregnancies, smooth deliveries without complications like breech births, and successful nursing phases. Furthermore, Brandon addresses young people struggling with self-image issues and eating disorders, specifically rebuking anorexia, bulimia, and obesity, while encouraging individuals to recognize their inherent physical value and seek godly relationships.
rawData: [November 25, 2024]-[A call to prayer - day 41 - praying over the war]-[https://youtu.be/f5V_EnA5kQ4]-[Good morning, family. How are you all doing today? It's Diana and Brandon again, and we have some things on our heart. I feel an urgency to pray about the war. It's very serious what the enemy's trying to do here. Remember I told you that Trump would have to—in one of the words I gave a couple of weeks ago—I told everybody that Trump would get in power. But when I'm praying today, the Lord is bringing up in my spirit that the enemy is going to try to make a wartime president out of Trump as a delay and a distraction through his four years of what God's trying to do. The Antichrist system is trying to rise up and provoke the Bear right now. I'm telling you by the spirit of the Lord, the Lord is wanting to give an extended period of grace and peace to the people with blessing, increase, and favor with what I've seen coming in 2025 and 2026. I've seen the plague, I've seen the crash, I've seen all that, but I'm telling you, whenever we prayed as hard as we did in October, we are turning that ship. But the enemy is not wanting to go quietly; he's trying to raise his head up. We know we have authority and we are seated with Jesus in the heavenlies, and we're not going to allow the demonic agenda. Let's take communion together and pray over this war scenario. There won't be millions of people who lose their lives; this has the potential to become something very ugly. We will pray over Putin and we will pray over Biden to stop this, that we will not have these long-range missiles shooting in there and poking the bear. I know what I've seen, but I'm still going to pray against it. I know the Lord is a good God and He wants to stop things, too. Father, we just thank You for Your communion. We thank You, Lord, that we have a covenant with You. You said in Your word that by Your stripes we are healed. You were wounded for our transgressions, You were bruised for our iniquities, the chastisement of our peace was upon You, and with Your stripes we're healed. Father, we take this body right now in the name of Jesus and we lift it before You. As we take this into our bodies, we thank You, Lord, that we're made whole. We thank You, Lord, that we're healed and whole and well by Your stripes. No weapon formed against us shall prosper, and every cell in our body is wall-to-wall Holy Ghost. Father, we do not have intruders in us of disease, cancers, diabetes, or any kind of disease. We have the Holy Spirit in us and we have the body that was broken for us, and we take that body by faith in the name of Jesus. Now, Father, we lift up the blood. We take this blood in the name of Jesus and thank You, Lord, that we plead the blood of Jesus over us. We make much of the blood, and the blood will make much of us. We thank You, Father, for the blood of Jesus that covers our sins and makes us whole. Amen. Lord, we enter in by the blood of the Lamb and by the word of our testimony over the wars and rumors of wars. We see what the devil's trying to do. Lord, You showed me the plans and the attacks of the enemy trying to come against this nation, even using Joe Biden. Father, I thank You that there's peace and there will not be a sudden destruction trying to keep President Biden in and President Trump out. Father, I thank You that Your hand is moving on this situation. We have angels that are going right now, and Holy Spirit, we ask You to work on behalf of us and on the hearts of men. Father, we lift up the war to You right now in the name of Jesus and we come against the spirit of war concerning Vladimir Putin, NATO, and America. Father, I speak to these demonic spirits that are calling this war to come forth for a loss of life, and we plead the blood of Jesus over these circumstances. Father, I thank You that Your angels are going right now and warring off these demonic spirits that are tormenting these men—over Biden, over Zelensky, over Putin, over NATO, and over all of France, Emmanuel Macron. I thank You, Father, right now in the name of Jesus, this is defused and it stops now. I thank You, Father, that the angels of the Lord are going and warring on behalf of us concerning this and the devils that are trying to stir up the Antichrist agenda. We plead the blood of Jesus over this circumstance. I thank You, Father, no matter what I've seen and what You showed me, I'm still going to pray for peace. I know what I've seen, but it's my job to pray peace over this. I call peace in the name of Jesus over Europe, that they'll not use hypersonic missiles, that they will not use nuclear, and they will not use new conventional weapons that we've never seen before causing mass casualties. Father, I thank You that everyone gets out of harm's way. I command in the name of Jesus this demonic spirit of Antichrist to be bound back for a time and a season. Father, we will have a major revival in Europe, and there will not be tens of thousands or hundreds of thousands of casualties in war. Getting North Korea involved, Japan, China, and all these other nations spreading through Iran, Iraq, Syria, and Turkey—I thank You, Father, right now in the name of Jesus, we call peace. Lord, I know You said there would be wars and rumors of wars. I thank You, Lord, that this is just a rumor and that we will have peace and revival. Father, I thank You that Biden steps out of this and that this stops now. Great peace will come over this, and President Trump will not be known as a wartime president. I know what I've seen concerning the plague. I know that he was in office whenever You showed me that this would take place, that there would be a major plague coming again. I know Your word says that there'll be plagues and pestilences, but Father, I thank You that even if it was to happen, it would not affect us. You said a thousand shall fall at our side and ten thousand at our right hand, but nothing shall come nigh us. Father, I thank You that we're always in the right place at the right time. We have favor, and as a nation, our homes are covered by the blood of Jesus. No plagues, no pestilence, and no war will come nigh our house. They're not going to blow up my home; they're not going to hurt my family. We're covered by the blood of Jesus. Just like the mighty men of David in the war, You always provided and protected him. Father, I thank You that Your will be done on Earth as it is in Heaven. We line up with what You say and we will speak and decree what You say to say, not what our flesh wants. I believe for peace, I believe for joy, and I believe that there are good days ahead of us. For me and my house, we'll have good days ahead of us. Father, I thank You for Elon Musk. I pray for him to be radically saved, born again, filled with, and controlled by the Holy Spirit. We thank You, Father, for good days concerning him. He would get radically saved, and even the women around him would be saved and he wouldn't be around Jezebels. Father, I thank You that Starlink would be used for the glory of God. I thank You that he would have a visitation from You and that he would be a loud voice for the Kingdom of God in these last days like another Billy Graham. I thank You, Father, for supernaturally visiting Elon Musk and President Trump. I thank You that President Trump will be radically born again with a voice crying in the wilderness telling people Jesus is coming. He would even be a great influence and a great voice with boldness in these last days to speak and decree the things that the Lord wants him to say and not hold back any of it. There'll be great revival on the Senate and the House floor, and I call revival all over the world. We thank You, Lord, for supernatural revival in the name of Jesus. This will be a time that we see our sons and our daughters, our old men and our young men, dream dreams and have visions beyond anything we could ever comprehend. Lord, we thank You that the devil's been bound for such a time as this concerning revival. We are seeing a house cleaning right now; judgment begins in the house of the Lord first. We are cleaning that bride up, making her look spotless and without wrinkle. We present ourselves to You holy. The blood of Jesus Christ covers us and we walk holy before You. I thank You, Father, for Your hand on our homes, our bodies, and our finances. Mentally, emotionally, physically, and financially we are blessed, and we believe that blessing is running over us in abundance. For anyone who is believing for a child, Father, we pray over their womb right now that it's able to conceive. Prepare their womb for what it needs to receive that child. I pray over the fallopian tubes to be healed in the name of Jesus. Ovaries, be healed. Hormones, in the name of Jesus. There's nothing missing and nothing broken from the top of her head to the soles of her feet. Father, I thank You even for women that have menstrual cycles with PMS and cramps. I pray for healing over menstrual cycles, that they are regular and that their bodies ovulate like they're supposed to. Father, we thank You over these women, their hormones, their hair, their nails, and their thyroid—that it functions like it's supposed to. For the ones wanting to conceive, they would conceive a healthy child. They would not have swollen feet or all the common things that happen when women get pregnant—the itchiness and the heartburn. Father, we thank You that that's under the curse and that You took it on the cross for us. They don't have to suffer these symptoms in pregnancy. They would have a blissful, happy, wonderful pregnancy and enjoy being pregnant. Their deliveries would be great and wonderful. They would not experience all the pain and turmoil. The baby would not be breached; it would come out head down the way it's supposed to. Father, we thank You that the cord is where it's supposed to be and everything's perfect. The baby comes out healthy and whole, and the Apgar scores are perfect. If the mother is nursing, the baby latches on like it's supposed to. The mother is able to nurse easily and has more than enough supply of milk. Everything goes well with nursing and the teething stage. As that child grows up, the mom and the dad train them up the way they're supposed to, and when they grow old, they will not depart from it. Father, I thank You that You are giving these children nurturing homes that develop the whole person—spirit, soul, and body. I thank You that these marriages are whole, healthy, and strong in the Lord. They lean not unto their own understanding, but in all their ways they acknowledge You, and You direct their paths. I'm just going to pray in the spirit for a minute. The only way I know how to push into it is by praying in the spirit and knowing how to direct this thing more. In the natural, I saw that many hands make light work, so we're just going to pray in the spirit. I don't want to be negative; I want to speak faith into it and believe for a turn of events. We thank You, Lord, that Your hand is on our nations and on us. A thousand shall fall at our side and ten thousand at our right hand, but it will not come nigh. I speak over Thanksgiving Day and the parade. We call forth all hidden things to be revealed in the name of Jesus. Every demonic plot is brought to justice, uncovered, and seen. I thank You, Lord, that You will bring the awakening. I'm calling for this to be uncovered over eating disorders. We come against eating disorders right now in the name of Jesus. We thank You, Lord, that the demonic spirit of anorexia is broken. You release that girl and let her go. You spirit of anorexia and bulimia, we break your power. We command you to release her right now. The devil's lying to you, honey. You don't have a weight issue; there's a devil that's tried to attach himself to you. I call you free. You try to hide this eating stuff and you have a self-image problem, but when you look in the mirror, you aren't fat. This is a demonic spirit whispering in your ear, and we command that spirit to go now. No more of the purging, the hiding food, or the anorexia and bulimia. You go now in Jesus' name. For whom the Son has set free is free indeed. I pray for healthy eating habits and a healthy mindset concerning food from here on out. Even with people who are obese, they are free from an addiction to food. I call myself free and delivered from eating disorders. We get our flesh under control, submit ourselves unto God, and resist the devil. anorexia is broken and bulimia is broken. Stand on that scripture: for whom the Son sets free is free indeed, with soundness of mind. Always listening to the devil saying you're not pretty enough is a lie. You're fearfully and wonderfully made. Psalm 139:14 says I will praise Thee for I am fearfully and wonderfully made. Psalm 139:13 says You formed my inward parts and knitted me together in my mother's womb. You're beautiful inside and out. No more self-image problems for these young people. Luke 12:7 says the very hairs of your head are all numbered. Do not be afraid; you are far more valuable than many sparrows. He thinks good thoughts of you. Psalm 139:17 says how precious are Your thoughts about me, O God. They outnumber the grains of sand. No boy on Instagram is worth it if he doesn't love you for you. Hold out for a godly spouse and renew your mind to what God says about you. His thoughts for you are more than the grains of sand on the beach at Galveston or Destin. You need to keep your head up because that's what matters. You are completely free from that insecurity and that demonic spirit. I pray the fill all through your homes, that you would experience the love of God right now. He would rest on you with a weightiness of His glory and a weightiness of His presence. A weight of the glory is filling the house today. Let the fire of the Holy Spirit flow inside of them, driving out all sickness and disease. Thank You for peace and joy. We celebrate the times we have left with our families because Jesus is coming. Heaven on Earth. We thank You, Lord, that we will have long life. You satisfy us and show us Your salvation. Our youth is renewed like the eagles and You fill our mouth with good things. This is a time of great favor and blessing. New Year's Eve is beautiful; it's a brand new start. We thank You for Inauguration Day, that President Trump will be safe and no weapon formed against him will prosper. It's exciting. I feel you pushing along with me. We'll pray more tomorrow about the war. Many hands make light work. I appreciate every single one of you showing up every day. As a watchman, when you see it, you have got to stay spiritually minded. We've got our prayer warriors on it. I'm not trying to be in fear; I'm just being serious. Help us; we're believing for a million prayer warriors to stick around and pray with us. We're kicking the butt of the devil and taking names. We want him to be scared of us; he runs in terror! Put a smile on your face and a song in your heart. Jesus loves you so much and we love you. We will see you again tomorrow. God bless you. Bye-bye.]
